overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a group of people gathered around a campfire on a rooftop at night, with a futuristic neon-lit city skyline featuring distinctive twin towers visible in the background. The atmosphere is intimate and moody, with warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue ambient glow of the cyberpunk cityscape.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot captures a group of people gathered around a central campfire on a rooftop at night. The scene features scattered seating, vehicle wreckage in the foreground, and distinctive satellite dishes framing the view of a futuristic city skyline with illuminated twin towers in the distance. The group sits and stands in a loose circle, conversing and gesturing while the fire provides warm illumination against the cool blue night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, intimate gathering on a rooftop that emphasizes the contrast between a warm communal fire and a cold, futuristic metropolis. It begins with a wide view of a group of people sitting and standing in a loose circle, their gestures illuminated by the flickering orange glow of a central campfire. As the eye moves across the rooftop, the foreground is defined by scattered seating and rusted vehicle wreckage, while large satellite dishes frame the periphery of the scene. The perspective then extends beyond the immediate warmth of the fire to reveal a sprawling cyberpunk skyline, where the cool blue ambient light of the night culminates in the distant, illuminated silhouettes of twin towers.
